Details: One study was found evaluating the reation byproducts of permethrin and chlorine. Under the conditions evaluated (10 ug/L permethrin, 8 mg/L chlorine, pH 7, and 20 degrees C) no byproducts were formed. after 4 hours, permethrin recovery was 85-95 percent, indicating no obervable consumption of permethrin by chlorine. [1433]
